title: West Accuses Belarus of Orchestrating Migrant Crisis at Polish Border
content: Poland has massed troops at the border, the European Union’s eastern frontier, to keep migrants camped there from crossing into the country.

more_info.byline: By Anton Troianovski, Monika Pronczuk and Anatol Magdziarz
des_facet: Middle East and Africa Migrant Crisis

en_title: West Accuses Belarus of Orchestrating Migrant Crisis at Polish Border
en_content: Poland has massed troops at the border, the European Union’s eastern frontier, to keep migrants camped there from crossing into the country.

title: A Chinese city tells overseas visitors to quarantine for 28 days, then do another 28.
content: The restrictions in Shenyang are a stark example of how seriously officials are taking the country’s “zero Covid” approach to the pandemic.
en_title: A Chinese city tells overseas visitors to quarantine for 28 days, then do another 28.
en_content: The restrictions in Shenyang are a stark example of how seriously officials are taking the country’s “zero Covid” approach to the pandemic.

title: Four Months, 5,000 Miles: A Refugee Puppet Looks for Home
content: In “The Walk,” a 12-foot tall, 9-year-old Syrian girl named Amal trekked from Turkey to Britain to find her mother. In a politically divided continent, were any minds changed?

more_info.byline: By Alex Marshall, Carlotta Gall and Elisabetta Povoledo

en_title: Four Months, 5,000 Miles: A Refugee Puppet Looks for Home
en_content: In “The Walk,” a 12-foot tall, 9-year-old Syrian girl named Amal trekked from Turkey to Britain to find her mother. In a politically divided continent, were any minds changed?

title: Masked Men Attacked a Soccer Player. Her Teammate Is Under Arrest.
content: A Paris St.-Germain women’s player was taken into custody by French investigators looking into a violent assault on a teammate who shares her position.
en_title: Masked Men Attacked a Soccer Player. Her Teammate Is Under Arrest.
en_content: A Paris St.-Germain women’s player was taken into custody by French investigators looking into a violent assault on a teammate who shares her position.

title: A Communist Leader Was Served Gold-Flecked Steak. The Video of It Has Vanished.
content: A celebrity chef showed the meal in a TikTok video, now removed, that angered people in Vietnam. Facebook said it was investigating why the chef’s hashtag was blocked from its site.
en_title: A Communist Leader Was Served Gold-Flecked Steak. The Video of It Has Vanished.
en_content: A celebrity chef showed the meal in a TikTok video, now removed, that angered people in Vietnam. Facebook said it was investigating why the chef’s hashtag was blocked from its site.

title: Mozambique’s Former Finance Minister Will Face Corruption Charges in U.S.
content: A judge overturned the South African government’s decision to send the minister back to Mozambique, where civil society groups say his political clout will protect him.
en_title: Mozambique’s Former Finance Minister Will Face Corruption Charges in U.S.
en_content: A judge overturned the South African government’s decision to send the minister back to Mozambique, where civil society groups say his political clout will protect him.

title: In France, the People the Climate Summit Forgot
content: In one area of France, worries about rising energy prices trump anxiety about rising temperatures, raising fears of a resurgence of the Yellow Vest social uprising.

des_facet: United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change

en_title: In France, the People the Climate Summit Forgot
en_content: In one area of France, worries about rising energy prices trump anxiety about rising temperatures, raising fears of a resurgence of the Yellow Vest social uprising.

title: India Eased Its Covid-19 Disaster. Fears of Complacency Remain.
content: The success represents a major victory for Narendra Modi’s government, but a recent slowdown in new vaccinations has sparked worries.

more_info.byline: By Emily Schmall and Hari Kumar

en_title: India Eased Its Covid-19 Disaster. Fears of Complacency Remain.
en_content: The success represents a major victory for Narendra Modi’s government, but a recent slowdown in new vaccinations has sparked worries.

title: As Distrust of China Grows, Europe May Inch Closer to Taiwan
content: Talks between European lawmakers and Taiwanese officials point to Europe’s increasing willingness to strengthen relations, despite Beijing’s threats.

more_info.byline: By Amy Qin and Steven Erlanger

en_title: As Distrust of China Grows, Europe May Inch Closer to Taiwan
en_content: Talks between European lawmakers and Taiwanese officials point to Europe’s increasing willingness to strengthen relations, despite Beijing’s threats.

title: American Journalist Held in Myanmar Faces 2 New Charges
content: Prosecutors filed charges of terrorism and sedition against the journalist Danny Fenster, who once worked at a hard-hitting news outlet hated by Myanmar’s governing military.
en_title: American Journalist Held in Myanmar Faces 2 New Charges
en_content: Prosecutors filed charges of terrorism and sedition against the journalist Danny Fenster, who once worked at a hard-hitting news outlet hated by Myanmar’s governing military.

title: As China’s Property Crisis Spreads, Beijing Says There’s Nothing to See
content: Global markets just weeks ago were fretting over the possible failure of Evergrande. Now the developer says the worst is over, even as other companies show signs of trouble.

more_info.byline: By Alexandra Stevenson and Joy Dong

en_title: As China’s Property Crisis Spreads, Beijing Says There’s Nothing to See
en_content: Global markets just weeks ago were fretting over the possible failure of Evergrande. Now the developer says the worst is over, even as other companies show signs of trouble.

title: France Will Require Booster Shot for Those 65 and Older
content: President Emmanuel Macron, in a televised speech, said that older people will now have to get the shots to remain eligible for a vaccine passport.
en_title: France Will Require Booster Shot for Those 65 and Older
en_content: President Emmanuel Macron, in a televised speech, said that older people will now have to get the shots to remain eligible for a vaccine passport.

title: Afghan Pilots Who Escaped Taliban Are Flown Out of Tajikistan
content: More than 140 Afghan Air Force pilots and crew members were evacuated to the United Arab Emirates three months after flying into Tajikistan to escape the Taliban.
en_title: Afghan Pilots Who Escaped Taliban Are Flown Out of Tajikistan
en_content: More than 140 Afghan Air Force pilots and crew members were evacuated to the United Arab Emirates three months after flying into Tajikistan to escape the Taliban.

title: Seeking Global Praise, Boris Johnson Instead Deals With Scandal at Home
content: As the host leader of the U.N. conference on global warming, Mr. Johnson was hoping to project statesmanship. But a mushrooming ethics scandal dominated the week, overshadowing his climate ambitions.

des_facet: United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change

en_title: Seeking Global Praise, Boris Johnson Instead Deals With Scandal at Home
en_content: As the host leader of the U.N. conference on global warming, Mr. Johnson was hoping to project statesmanship. But a mushrooming ethics scandal dominated the week, overshadowing his climate ambitions.

title: French Court Convicts Man in the Murder of a Holocaust Survivor
content: The man, Yacine Mihoub, was sentenced to life imprisonment for killing Mireille Knoll, 85, in 2018, which judges said was a hate crime motivated by the fact that she was Jewish.
en_title: French Court Convicts Man in the Murder of a Holocaust Survivor
en_content: The man, Yacine Mihoub, was sentenced to life imprisonment for killing Mireille Knoll, 85, in 2018, which judges said was a hate crime motivated by the fact that she was Jewish.

title: A judge rejects Pennsylvania’s school mask mandate, but it remains in place while the state appeals.
content: The judges said that the state’s acting health secretary had overstepped her authority in issuing the mandate, and that they were not taking a position on “the science or efficacy of mask-wearing.”

org_facet: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention

en_title: A judge rejects Pennsylvania’s school mask mandate, but it remains in place while the state appeals.
en_content: The judges said that the state’s acting health secretary had overstepped her authority in issuing the mandate, and that they were not taking a position on “the science or efficacy of mask-wearing.”

title: Why some Middle Easterners are gambling all they have to reach Europe.
content: Iraqis and Syrians making the expensive and perilous journey to Belarus, hoping to get into the European Union, say they’ve lost hope for a future at home.

more_info.byline: By Jane Arraf and Hwaida Saad

en_title: Why some Middle Easterners are gambling all they have to reach Europe.
en_content: Iraqis and Syrians making the expensive and perilous journey to Belarus, hoping to get into the European Union, say they’ve lost hope for a future at home.

title: Boris Johnson urges negotiators to ‘pull out all the stops’ as the U.N. summit nears its end.
content: “Now is the time to get together and show the determination needed to power on through the blockages,” the British prime minister said on Wednesday.
en_title: Boris Johnson urges negotiators to ‘pull out all the stops’ as the U.N. summit nears its end.
en_content: “Now is the time to get together and show the determination needed to power on through the blockages,” the British prime minister said on Wednesday.

title: Greta Thunberg and other activists petition the U.N. to declare a state of emergency on climate change.
content: Young climate activists on Wednesday called on the U.N. to declare a “Level 3” emergency, as it did for Covid-19, allowing the institution to deploy resources to vulnerable countries.
en_title: Greta Thunberg and other activists petition the U.N. to declare a state of emergency on climate change.
en_content: Young climate activists on Wednesday called on the U.N. to declare a “Level 3” emergency, as it did for Covid-19, allowing the institution to deploy resources to vulnerable countries.

title: In video: Razor wire, soldiers and desperation at the border.
en_title: In video: Razor wire, soldiers and desperation at the border.

title: Migrants, often assisted by travel agents, are flown to Belarus before being escorted to border.
content: A spike in air travel from the Middle East to Belarus points to a concerted effort to funnel migrant toward the European Union, E.U. officials say.

title: Germany debates imposing tighter rules as infections surge.
content: Nearly 40,000 new cases were registered in the country on Tuesday — the third time a daily record was set within a week. “We have a real emergency situation,” a top virologist said.

content: Will it show that government can still do big things?

title: U.S. Holocaust Museum Says China ‘May Be Committing Genocide’ Against Uyghurs
content: Its report found that the government’s attacks against the group of Muslims in Xinjiang had escalated and most likely included “forced sterilization, sexual violence, enslavement, torture, and forcible transfer.”

Human Rights and Human Rights Violations

title: Malala Yousafzai Announces Her Marriage
content: Ms. Yousafzai, a Pakistani activist and the youngest-ever recipient of a Nobel Peace Prize, married her partner at a small ceremony in Birmingham, England, she said on Twitter.

title: Ethiopia Seizes Dozens of U.N. Workers as Civil War Spreads and Famine Looms
content: The detentions aggravated the already tense relations between the United Nations and the Ethiopian government over war and hunger in the country’s rebel-held Tigray region.
